name: Bitbucket
description: Monitor Bitbucket repositories and workspace members for source code management and access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Bitbucket
2. Go to Personal Settings > App passwords
3. Create an App Password with Repositories:Read and Account:Read permissions
4. Base64-encode 'your_username:app_password'
5. Paste the encoded string below

credentialFields.label: Base64 Encoded Token
credentialFields.helpText: Base64-encode 'username:app_password'. Create an App Password in Bitbucket > Personal Settings > App passwords

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Lists Bitbucket repositories to verify code changes are tracked

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Bitbucket workspace members for employee access management
